hero.name: Yunus Mümin
hero.tagline: Software engineer, AI researcher, and community builder.
hero.bio: Final-year Computer Engineering student at Eastern Mediterranean University. Interned at Huawei Istanbul R&D, organizing AISummit — TRNC's largest AI conference.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Things I've built
projects.adpilot_desc: LLM-powered ad platform. Chatbot and RAG system for Cyprus SMBs, with Meta & Google API integration.
projects.dataharvest_desc: Agricultural IoT platform. Sensor data interpretation, recommendation algorithm, Flutter mobile app, Laravel backend.
projects.chiphead_desc: EMU GameJam #4 game built in 48 hours. Algorithms written with Unity 2D and C#.
projects.designpilot_desc: AI-powered design analysis tool. Color theory, composition, and message delivery scoring.
